guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor onboarding assessment is complete and eligible for fast-track approval. Your role is to review and approve the procurement recommendation. The integration is classified as Tier 3 (Export Only) with UNREGULATED data, no DPA requirements, and an executed NDA. No security blockers or follow-up actions are required from your department. Your approval is the first step in the fast-track path and is estimated to take 2 business days. Please review the attached checklist summary and issue your approval to proceed to Business Owner sign-off.
next_steps: Review vendor classification (Class C) and integration tier (Tier 3 - Export Only) against procurement standards.
Confirm alignment with fast-track approval path per Procurement Approval Matrix section C-T1.
Issue approval to advance to Business Owner for operational sign-off.
Estimated completion: 2 business days from this guidance issuance.

guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor onboarding assessment is complete and ready for your operational approval. All compliance checks have cleared: data is UNREGULATED, no DPA is required, the NDA is executed, and no security follow-up is needed. The integration is classified as Tier 3 (Export Only). Your approval is the final step in the fast-track path. Once Procurement Manager has approved, please review the checklist and issue your operational sign-off to close the onboarding process.
next_steps: Await Procurement Manager approval (estimated 2 business days).
Review vendor integration scope and data classification (UNREGULATED, Tier 3 - Export Only).
Confirm operational feasibility and resource allocation for the integration.
Issue operational approval to complete the fast-track onboarding.
Estimated completion: 3 business days from Procurement Manager approval.
